src/App.jsx.description: Main entrypoint managing state, layout config, node authorities, and view transformations.

src/components/Dashboard/Layout.jsx.description: Premium layout system incorporating glassmorphism, resizable sidebar drawers, unified top headers, cost monitoring, and speech telemetry integration.

src/components/Dashboard/ChatHistory.jsx.description: Sidebar control panel displaying persistent conversation histories with search filters, pinned items, single deletion visual progress bars, and bulk deletion safeguards.

src/components/Dashboard/ChatInterface.j.description: Core interface for processing text conversations, model suggestions, and rendering drive file previews.

src/components/KnowledgeMesh/SpatialCanv.description: 3D interactive spatial knowledge mesh rendering primary connections as straight lines and transverse connections as outward curves, utilizing dynamic billboard text textures.

src/components/KnowledgeMesh/InstancedSp.description: High-performance instanced 3D spatial knowledge mesh rendering with high vertex count and structured text labels.

src/components/KnowledgeMesh/SunburstCan.description: Interactive concentric nested radial SVG chart showcasing node hierarchy, clicked-based zoom/drill-down, and curved secondary transverse links.

src/components/KnowledgeMesh/MeshCanvas..description: High-performance interactive 2D Mycelium and Vertical tree canvas with spline connection engines, node editing actions, and query matching overlays.
